description: Controls if and what values are saved from zones in an exported results file. See the model results export command. By default, zones values are active . The values being exported by default are forces , groups , and displacements .

keywords.name: active
keywords.description: controls if any structural element values will be exported

keywords.name: displacements
keywords.description: displacement vectors at nodes

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: all extra variables at elements, nodes, and links

keywords.name: forces
keywords.description: force information at nodes, including nodal forces necessary for stress recovery

keywords.name: groups
keywords.description: group assignments to elements, nodes, and links

keywords.name: links
keywords.description: all link information is stored, including models and properties

keywords.name: properties
keywords.description: element properties

keywords.name: velocities
keywords.description: velocity vectors at nodes
